heading: Tully Heads vs Tumoulin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tully Heads, Queensland and Tumoulin, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tully Heads and Tumoulin have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Tully Heads or Tumoulin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tully Heads has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Tumoulin scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tully Heads scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Tumoulin scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tully Heads or Tumoulin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tully Heads has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
